title: China’s state media turns to social media and AI to tell its story - and often mock U.S.
description: The messaging from China’s Communist government may once have been dogmatic and rigid — not anymore. Having largely tamed the internet at home with tight censorship, Beijing is now tapping the power of social media and artificial intelligence to tell its story — and often to skewer the U.S. and…

title: AI is coming for your job, your partner and even your god
description: Grayson Perry’s ability to see the absurd is necessary in this terrifying look into how artificial intelligence is set to transform humanity
content:
Grayson Perry Has seen the Future (Channel 4) and he doesn’t like it. After watching this programme, neither do I. AI is going to transform humanity, and it’s in the hands of people who seem oddly blasé about the consequences.

title: AI-driven chip shortage slowing efforts to get world online: GSMA
description: A memory chip crunch fueled by the artificial intelligence boom is hindering efforts to bring more people online worldwide, the head of the GSMA telecoms industry association told AFP. An estimated 2.2 billion people -- around a quarter of the global population -- were not connected to the internet at…

title: RCMP usage could lead to issues, expert warns
description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police in British Columbia is testing an artificial intelligence tool designed to help officers write reports, but experts warn the technology could introduce errors with serious consequences in the justice system.

title: New grant funds AI search for genetic targets to treat Alzheimer's
description: With a new $6.2 million, five-year grant from the National Institute on Aging, researchers at Case Western Reserve University will use artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to identify possible genetic targets to treat Alzheimer's disease.
